title: asteroschoenus rigidus
intro: Asteroschoenus rigidus, also known as stiff club-rush, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Asteroschoenus rigidus include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and poultices for topical application.
